channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok Acquisition: Elon Musk Rules Out Buying U.S. Business - A Detailed Analysis
item.description: Elon Musk rules out buying TikTok's US business, citing his preference for building companies from scratch. Donald Trump's proposal to create a sovereign wealth fund to partially own the social media app remains in limbo.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Iberdrola Expands Partnership with Amazon Web Services to Include Iberia Market - Renewable Energy Boost
item.description: Iberdrola and Amazon Web Services (AWS) expand their partnership, focusing on the Iberia market. The energy company has signed new power purchase agreements (PPAs) for 476 megawatts of renewable energy in Spain and Portugal.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
